zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan於大約1367年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登亞賀頓時，他的父親William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan78歲，母親Margaret MacLeod of Lewis18歲。他於1393年與Moira Macdonald of Moidart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1411年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1457年在他的家鄉享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan于大约1367年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾登亞賀頓时，他的父亲William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan78岁，母亲Margaret MacLeod of Lewis18岁。他于1393年与Moira Macdonald of Moidart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1411年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1457年在他的家乡享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Malcom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: Beag
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Latin Beatus ‘blessed’, name of the apostle of Switzerland; pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan was born about 1367, in Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan, was 78 and his mother, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, was 18. He married Moira Macdonald of Moidart in 1393, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1411. He died about 1457, in his hometown, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan est né environ 1367, à Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan, avait 78 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Moira Macdonald of Moidart en 1393, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1411. Il est décédé environ 1457, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan um 1367 in Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan 78 und seine Mutter Margaret MacLeod of Lewis 18. Er hat 1393 in Schottland, United Kingdom Moira Macdonald of Moidart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1411 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1457 im Alter von 92 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan è nato il circa 1367 nel Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan, aveva 78 anni e il suo madre, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Moira Macdonald of Moidart nel 1393, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1411. Morì circa 1457, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattanが約1367年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダナチトンで生まれた時，父William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattanは78歳，母Margaret MacLeod of Lewisは18歳であった。1393年にイギリススコットランドでMoira Macdonald of Moidartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1457年に故郷で92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 던악h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan(은)는 78세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret MacLeod of Lewis(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1393년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Moira Macdonald of Moidart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1457년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan, tinha 78 anos e sua mãe, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Moira Macdonald of Moidart em 1393, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1411. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1457, em sua cidade natal, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan родился около 1367 г. в местности дуначтон, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan было 78 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Moira Macdonald of Moidart в 1393 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1411 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1457 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcom - Beag Mackintosh 10th of Mackintosh, 11th of Chattan nació aproximadamente 1367, en Dunachton, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan, tenía 78 años y su mamá, Margaret MacLeod of Lewis, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Moira Macdonald of Moidart en 1393, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1411. Murió aproximadamente 1457, en su pueblo, a la edad de 92 años.
